# Invalid Property Value

**API Collection**

A constant to indicate that a property accessed by [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAsset/value(forProperty:)] is invalid.

## Constants

- **ALErrorInvalidProperty**: Value returned by [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAsset/value(forProperty:)] if the property you tried to access is invalid.

## Constants

- **Property Keys**: Constants for the keys for the properties you can get from an asset.
- **Asset Types**: Constants that specify the type of an asset.
